name: Classic Menemen
instructions: Chop the peppers and sauté in oil. Add diced tomatoes and cook until the water is absorbed. Add beaten eggs and spices, then cook while stirring.

name: Lentil Soup
instructions: Sauté chopped vegetables in oil. Add tomato paste and washed lentils. Add water and boil until vegetables are soft, then blend until smooth.

name: Potato Moussaka
instructions: Layer sliced potatoes in a tray. Sauté minced meat with onions and tomato paste, then spread over the potatoes. Add a little water and bake until potatoes are soft.

name: Zucchini Fritters (Mucver)
instructions: Grate zucchinis and squeeze out the excess water. Mix with egg, flour, cheese, and chopped dill. Fry spoonfuls of the mixture in hot oil until golden brown.

name: Sucuk with Eggs
instructions: Fry sliced sucuk in butter. Crack eggs over them and wait until the whites are cooked. Sprinkle with red pepper flakes and serve hot.

name: Pasta with Tomato Sauce
instructions: Boil and drain the pasta. Sauté tomato paste and mint in butter, then mix with the pasta. Serve warm.

name: Tomato Soup
instructions: Roast flour in butter and add grated tomatoes. Add water and milk, then bring to a boil. Serve with grated kashar cheese.

name: Chicken Saute
instructions: Sauté chicken on high heat. Add vegetables and continue cooking until soft. Add thyme and remove from heat.

name: Kisir (Bulgur Salad)
instructions: Soak bulgur in hot water until soft. Knead with tomato paste, oil, and molasses, then add finely chopped greens.

name: Rice Pilaf
instructions: Sauté orzo until brown, then add washed rice. Sauté until translucent, add hot water, and cook on low heat until water is absorbed.

name: Olive Oil Green Beans
instructions: Layer beans and onions in a pot. Add olive oil, sugar, and tomatoes. Cook in its own juice on low heat until tender.

name: Spinach Stew
instructions: Sauté onion, add paste and spinach. Sprinkle with rice and add a little water. Cook until rice is tender.

name: Potato Salad
instructions: Dice boiled potatoes. Mix with chopped greens, olive oil, and plenty of lemon juice.

name: Baked Meatballs
instructions: Knead and shape meatballs. Arrange in a tray with potatoes. Pour tomato sauce over them and bake until golden brown.

name: Cheese Rolls
instructions: Place cheese filling on dough triangles and roll up. Fry in hot oil until golden.

name: Bulgur Pilaf
instructions: Sauté vegetables, add paste and bulgur. Add hot water and simmer until the water is absorbed.

name: Eggs with Meat
instructions: Sauté meat with onions and spices. Crack eggs over the mixture, cover, and cook until desired consistency.

name: Vermicelli Soup
instructions: Sauté paste in butter, add water. Once boiling, add vermicelli and cook until soft. Sprinkle with mint.

name: Eggplant Musakka
instructions: Fry eggplants and layer in a pot. Pour sautéed meat mixture over them and cook with a little water.

name: Yogurt Pasta
instructions: Mix boiled pasta with garlic yogurt. Pour melted butter with red pepper flakes over it.

name: Cacik
instructions: Grate cucumbers and mix with garlic yogurt. Thin with water, then add mint and oil.

name: Bread Pizza
instructions: Spread paste on bread, add toppings. Bake until the cheese is melted.

name: Eggplant Salad
instructions: Chop roasted vegetables. Mix with a dressing of garlic, lemon, and olive oil.

name: Chicken over Rice
instructions: Shred boiled chicken. Cook rice with chicken broth and serve topped with shredded chicken.

name: Stuffed Peppers
instructions: Fill peppers with rice and meat mixture. Place in a pot with tomato sauce and cook until rice is tender.

name: Lentil Meatballs
instructions: Boil lentils and let bulgur soak in them. Mix with sautéed onions and greens, then shape by hand.

name: Rice Pudding
instructions: Boil rice, add milk and sugar. Thicken with rice flour, boil again, and pour into bowls.

name: Kidney Beans
instructions: Sauté vegetables, add boiled beans and water. Cook until vegetables are tender.

name: French Fries
instructions: Slice potatoes and fry in hot oil. Sprinkle with salt and thyme while hot.

name: Hummus
instructions: Blend boiled chickpeas with tahini, lemon, and garlic. Serve with a drizzle of olive oil.

name: Garlic Butter Pasta
instructions: Boil pasta. Sauté lots of garlic in butter and oil. Toss with pasta and salt.

name: Mashed Potatoes
instructions: Boil potatoes until soft. Mash with butter, milk, and salt until creamy.

name: Scrambled Eggs with Cheese
instructions: Whisk eggs with salt. Melt butter in a pan, pour eggs, add cheese, and stir until cooked.

name: Onion Rings (Home Style)
instructions: Slice onions into rings. Coat with flour and salt. Fry in deep oil until golden brown.

name: Chicken Broth Soup
instructions: Boil chicken with onions, carrots, and garlic. Shred chicken and serve with the broth.

name: Boiled Eggs
instructions: Place eggs in cold water. Bring to boil and cook for 6-10 minutes depending on desired firmness.

name: Yogurt Soup (Yayla)
instructions: Boil rice in water. Mix yogurt and egg, temper with rice water, and add to pot. Top with melted butter.

name: Oven Roasted Potatoes
instructions: Dice potatoes. Toss with oil, salt, and minced garlic. Bake until crispy and brown.

name: Ground Beef Rice
instructions: Sauté ground beef and onions. Add washed rice, sauté briefly, add water, and cook until water is absorbed.

name: Zucchini Soup
instructions: Sauté onions and zucchinis. Boil with water, blend until smooth. Add milk and boil once more.

name: Pasta with Yogurt and Meat
instructions: Boil pasta. Top with garlic yogurt and sautéed ground beef. Add melted butter sauce.

name: Carrot Salad with Yogurt
instructions: Grate carrots and sauté in oil. Mix with garlic yogurt and salt.

name: Tomato Omelet
instructions: Sauté chopped tomatoes in oil. Pour beaten eggs over them and cook until set.

name: Simple Chicken Wings
instructions: Marinate wings with oil, salt, and garlic. Bake or fry until golden brown.

name: Bulgur with Chickpeas
instructions: Sauté onion in butter. Add bulgur and boiled chickpeas. Add water and cook until absorbed.

name: Egg Salad
instructions: Boil eggs and dice them. Mix with chopped onions, lemon juice, oil, and salt.

name: Garlic Bread
instructions: Mix garlic with butter. Spread on bread slices and bake until crispy.

name: Potato and Egg Scramble
instructions: Fry diced potatoes and onions. Pour whisked eggs over and stir until cooked.

name: Boiled Chicken Breast
instructions: Boil chicken breast in salted water. Slice and serve with lemon juice.

name: Turkish Pasta (Manti Style)
instructions: Boil pasta. Top with garlic yogurt and a sauce made of butter and tomato paste.

name: Rice with Chickpeas
instructions: Sauté rice in butter. Add boiled chickpeas and water. Cook on low heat.

name: Stewed Zucchini
instructions: Sauté onion, add diced zucchini and tomatoes. Cook in own juice until tender.

name: Carrot Soup
instructions: Sauté vegetables, boil in water until soft. Blend until smooth and add salt.

name: Eggplant in Oven
instructions: Slice eggplant and tomatoes. Layer with garlic and oil in a tray. Bake until soft.

name: Fried Sucuk
instructions: Slice sucuk and fry in a pan with very little oil until crispy.

name: Lentil Salad
instructions: Boil lentils until tender but not mushy. Mix with chopped onions, lemon, and oil.

name: Green Pepper Saute
instructions: Sauté peppers in oil. Add garlic and diced tomatoes. Cook until sauce thickens.

name: Cheesy Pasta
instructions: Boil pasta. Drain and mix with butter and plenty of cheese while hot.

name: Chicken and Potatoes
instructions: Place chicken and potato wedges in a tray. Add sliced onions, oil, and salt. Bake until golden.

name: Yogurt with Garlic
instructions: Crush garlic and mix with yogurt and salt. Perfect as a side sauce.

name: Fried Potatoes and Peppers
instructions: Fry potato cubes first, then add peppers. Fry until both are crispy.

name: Beef and Pepper Saute
instructions: Sauté beef on high heat. Add onions and peppers. Cook until vegetables are soft.

name: Tomato and Onion Salad
instructions: Slice tomatoes and onions thinly. Mix with lemon juice, oil, and salt.

name: Simple Bulgur Soup
instructions: Sauté onion and paste. Add bulgur and water. Boil until bulgur is soft.

name: Chicken with Garlic
instructions: Sauté chicken strips in butter and oil. Add minced garlic at the end to prevent burning.

name: Potato and Cheese Bake
instructions: Slice potatoes thinly. Layer in tray with salt and milk. Top with cheese and bake.

name: Ground Beef Omelet
instructions: Sauté ground beef and onions. Pour beaten eggs over the top and cook.

name: Zucchini with Yogurt
instructions: Dice and fry zucchinis. Drain and serve with garlic yogurt on top.

name: Rice with Vermicelli
instructions: Brown small pasta (vermicelli) in butter. Add rice and water. Cook until done.

name: Lentil and Rice Mix (Mujadara)
instructions: Boil lentils. Sauté rice and lentils together. Top with heavily caramelized onions.

name: Creamy Tomato Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta. Make a sauce with butter, grated tomatoes, and milk. Combine and serve.

name: Boiled Chickpeas
instructions: Boil chickpeas until very soft. Serve as a snack with salt and a bit of oil.

name: Garlic Sautéed Mushrooms
instructions: Sauté mushrooms on high heat with butter and garlic until golden.

name: Bulgur with Tomato
instructions: Sauté onion and tomatoes. Add bulgur and water. Cook until bulgur is tender.

name: Egg with Sucuk and Cheese
instructions: Fry sucuk, add eggs, then top with cheese. Cover the pan until cheese melts.

name: Onion and Egg Fry
instructions: Caramelize onions in oil. Add eggs and scramble together. Season with salt.

name: Boiled Potatoes with Garlic
instructions: Boil potatoes and dice. Toss with raw garlic, oil, and salt while still hot.

name: Chicken and Rice Soup
instructions: Boil chicken and rice together. Add salt and plenty of lemon juice before serving.

name: Roasted Eggplant with Yogurt
instructions: Roast eggplant in oven, peel and mash. Mix with garlic yogurt and salt.

name: Ground Beef and Potato Stew
instructions: Sauté beef and onions. Add paste and potatoes. Add water and simmer.

name: Bread and Butter Pudding (Simple)
instructions: Soak bread in egg, milk, and sugar mixture. Bake in a buttered dish until golden.

name: Zucchini Pancakes
instructions: Grate zucchini, mix with egg and flour to make a batter. Fry spoonfuls in oil.

name: Spicy Tomato Sauce Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta. Sauté garlic and tomatoes with extra pepper. Combine and serve.

name: Mushroom and Cheese Omelet
instructions: Sauté mushrooms. Pour eggs over, add cheese, fold omelet and serve.

name: Carrot and Zucchini Saute
instructions: Slice vegetables into sticks. Sauté with garlic and oil until tender.

name: Simple Chicken Salad
instructions: Boil chicken and shred. Mix with onions, lemon juice, and oil.

name: Rice with Milk (Saltic)
instructions: Boil rice in very little water, then add milk and salt. Cook until creamy. Add butter.

name: Pasta with Butter and Garlic
instructions: Boil pasta. Sauté garlic in butter and toss with the hot pasta.

name: Roasted Peppers
instructions: Roast peppers, peel them. Marinate with garlic, lemon juice, and oil.

name: Ground Beef and Beans
instructions: Sauté beef and onions. Add paste and boiled beans. Cook with water until thick.

name: Cucumber and Yogurt Salad
instructions: Slice cucumbers. Mix with garlic yogurt and salt. Serve chilled.

name: Tomato and Cheese Toast
instructions: Place tomato and cheese on bread. Butter the outside and toast in a pan.

name: Zucchini and Potato Stew
instructions: Sauté onion, add diced potato and zucchini. Cook with a little water until soft.

name: Chicken and Mushroom Mix
instructions: Sauté onions, add chicken, then mushrooms. Cook on high heat until dry.

name: Lentil Soup with Rice
instructions: Sauté onion and paste. Add lentils and rice. Boil until both are very soft.

name: Fried Zucchini and Carrots
instructions: Slice vegetables into rounds and fry in oil. Serve with salt.

name: Simple Beef Broth Soup
instructions: Boil ground beef with onions and garlic. Add rice and cook until soft.

name: Rice with Tomato Paste
instructions: Sauté rice in butter, add tomato paste. Add water and cook until absorbed.

name: Garlic Yogurt with Chickpeas
instructions: Mix boiled chickpeas with garlic yogurt. Drizzle with oil before serving.

name: Fried Bread with Eggs
instructions: Dip bread in whisked eggs with salt. Fry in butter until golden on both sides.
